name: openclaw-xiaoai
description: 小爱音箱 OpenClaw 桥接服务 + Channel Plugin

scripts.serve: fuser -k 4399/tcp 4400/tcp 2>/dev/null; nohup tsx src/index.ts >> server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > .pid && echo "PID: $(cat .pid)"
scripts.serve:stop: if [ -f .pid ]; then kill $(cat .pid) 2>/dev/null; rm .pid; echo 'stopped'; else fuser -k 4399/tcp 2>/dev/null && echo 'stopped' || echo 'not running'; fi
scripts.serve:status: if [ -f .pid ] && kill -0 $(cat .pid) 2>/dev/null; then echo "running (PID: $(cat .pid))"; else echo 'not running'; fi
scripts.serve:install: sudo cp openclaw.service /etc/systemd/system/ && sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable openclaw && echo 'systemd enabled'
scripts.serve:uninstall: sudo systemctl disable openclaw && sudo rm /etc/systemd/system/openclaw.service && sudo systemctl daemon-reload && echo 'systemd disabled'
